classification.reasoning: The document contains a chief complaint, diagnosis, investigation ordered, and clinical notes, which are typical components of a diagnostic report. Although it is labeled as a prescription at the end, the content suggests it is more aligned with a diagnostic report.

## Dr. Venkat Rao

MBBS, MS (Orthopedics) Registration No: AP/67890/2017 Spine Care Centre, Hyderabad

| Patient Name   | Suresh Patil   |
|----------------|----------------|
| Age            | 50 Years       |
| Gender         | Male           |
| Date           | 20-Jun-2026    |

## Chief Complaint

Severe lower back pain radiating to the left leg.

## Diagnosis

Suspected Lumbar Disc Herniation

## Investigation Ordered

MRI Lumbar Spine

## Clinical Notes

Patient reports pain for 3 weeks. Clinical examination suggests possible disc prolapse.

## Document Type: PRESCRIPTION
